input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.1.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.1.3
            TITLE: accumulator

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.1.3: Accumulator
EV.1.3 Accumulator  
All the battery cells or super capacitors that store the electrical energy to be used by the 
Tractive System

final_answer: rule EV.1.3: Accumulator EV.1.3 Accumulator All the battery cells or super capacitors that store the electrical energy to be used by the Tractive System
